deterministic.engagement_rationale: 12 signals in the last 30 days from 3 contacts.

llm_produced.narrative: Engagement at Revenant Systems is medium, with 12 signals across the window from three contacts, though product usage is concentrated almost entirely on Alex Anderson — the only user generating product events. Sentiment is mixed to negative: while Alex Anderson remains actively using the product (file uploads, exports, report generation, a share link on 2026-05-08, and a plan_changed event on 2026-04-23), multiple email signals surface unresolved friction. Casey Thomas raised a multi-region data residency gap on 2026-04-20 ('Re: dashboard access') and flagged a contract renewal need tied to custom metadata filtering in the API on 2026-04-19 ('Contract renewal'). Alex Garcia requested scoped read-only API access on 2026-04-22 ('Re: feature roadmap'), calling the current all-or-nothing key model a security issue. Alex Anderson separately reported recurring integration setup difficulties on 2026-04-22 ('Integration setup'). Several product gaps — integration setup, API permissioning, data residency, and metadata filtering — are converging around what appears to be an upcoming renewal discussion, and none have visible resolutions yet.
